failures.description: The agent invented/altered the answer during synthesis by replacing the grounded count of 9 with 16 and adding an unsupported record identifier.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The required tool call was made correctly and returned clear evidence: count = 9 available Jigsaw Puzzle items. At step 4, the Executor had all necessary information but produced an answer saying there are 16 options and cited record 0000000000. Both the count 16 and the record id are absent from the tool output and contradict the available evidence. This error was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the incorrect answer.
